description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single stage test and a job named test:cargo that runs in the test stage using the rustlang/rust:nightly Docker image. The job executes the following script commands in order: rustc --version && cargo --version; cargo check --no-default-features; cargo check; cargo check --features encoding,websocket,docs; cargo test --doc; cargo test; cargo test websocket --features websocket. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
